title: ASR Outdoor Round Duffel Bag Adjustable Shoulder Strap Travel 16 Liter
description:
Travel in style with the ASR Outdoor 16" Black Duffel Bag! This classic round duffel bag measures 16" x 9" x 9", making it a great travel bag for going to the gym, overnight trips or camping. It has one spacious main zippered compartment that has a carrying capacity of up to 16 liters (970 cubic inches), so you can count on it to store all of your essentials like shoes, a change of clothes and more. The duffel comes with a shoulder strap that adjusts up to 52" with a metal connection clasp so you can easily carry it over your shoulder for custom comfort. The bag also features a padded hook and loop fastener top carry handle as well as dual side grab handles for easy portability

ASR Outdoor Round Duffel Bag Adjustable Shoulder Strap Travel 16 Liter

Travel in style with the ASR Outdoor 16" Black Duffel Bag!

Key Features

  • CLASSIC MATTE BLACK COLOR - Suitable for Most Fashion Styles | Great for Travelers, Athletes and Campers
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of Water Resistant 600D Polyester to Protect Belongings | Professionally Weaved Seems Ensure Long-term Use
  • SPACIOUS STORAGE - Round Duffel Bag Measures 16" x 9" x 9" | Carry Capacity of up to 16 Liters - Easily Holds Shoes, Change of Clothes and More
  • VERSATILE DESIGN - Dual Side Grab Handle and Top Carry Handle with Padded Hook & Loop Fastener Provide Optimal Portability
  • ADJUSTABLE STRAP - Comes with Shoulder Strap that Adjusts up to 52" | Allows for Custom Comfort

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO21RDBBLK
  • UPC: 810058468031

This classic round duffel bag measures 16" x 9" x 9", making it a great travel bag for going to the gym, overnight trips or camping. It has one spacious main zippered compartment that has a carrying capacity of up to 16 liters (970 cubic inches), so you can count on it to store all of your essentials like shoes, a change of clothes and more. The duffel comes with a shoulder strap that adjusts up to 52" with a metal connection clasp so you can easily carry it over your shoulder for custom comfort.

The bag also features a padded hook and loop fastener top carry handle as well as dual side grab handles for easy portability. It's constructed of durable 600D polyester that is water resistant to protect your belongings during travel and was made with professionally weaved seams that will ensure long-lasting use. The trendy matte black color is suitable for most fashion styles. This is a must-have duffel bag for campers, athletes and travel enthusiasts!
